title: Employee Document Management System
description: Manage employee contracts, certificates, and benefit documents while AI surfaces expiry risks and HR compliance gaps.
description_cn: 统一管理员工合同、证照和福利文件，用 AI 识别到期风险，提升 HR 档案合规性。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Employee Document Management System: a document library, file categorization, expiry reminders, and an employee-document analysis report. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/37-employee-documents.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 员工档案管理系统：文档库、档案分类、到期提醒和员工档案分析报告。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/37-employee-documents.html
featureList:
Document library
File categorization
Expiry reminders
An employee-document analysis report
about:
employee document management
HR
AI no-code app builder
internal tools
NocoBase
